violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cardboard box tops were being used to store breaded tempura shrimp in the walk in freezer. Food contact surfaces need to be a cleanable surface.--Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The shelf for the to go containers by the door to the kitchen is lined with a cardboard box. This is not a cleanable surface.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The fan by the door to the kitchen needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors behind the cooking equipment and under the sink and dishwasher need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken and missing floor tile by the door to the kitchen, ice machine, and dish area.

Time as a public health control. — --Food was not marked or identified with the time within which it must be cooked, served, or discarded. Container for sushi rice up front was not marked with a time it was made, or must be discarded. The rice temped at 95 degrees. This must be labeled with a time and must be discarded after four hours.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The piping in the hood system needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of foam cups were stored on the floor in the storage area by the ice cream freezer.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors under the fryers needs to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. Broken and missing floor tile in the dish area, by the ice machine, and by the door to the kitchen.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
